{{Quote|Mm – wha'?... Repor' t' m' ship –? Wha' happent—?|A less-than-sober Branox|<ref name="world" />}}
'''Branox''' was a [[Hrakian]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who, in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], made a stop at [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]]. Branox was getting [[Alcohol/Legends|drunk]] in a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] when he had an encounter with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], who were on the hunt for a Hrakian [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. Their owner [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], along with fellow Rebels [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Falud]], and [[Paxin]] were being held captive by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] troops aboard a Hrakian [[Starship/Legends|starship]], and the droids needed a Hrakian to pose as their owner to help them get aboard. C-3PO and R2-D2 quickly identified the confused and near-unconscious Branox as a perfect candidate, and ushered the confused spacer to the starship and used him to pass security. As soon as they reached their destination, they cast Branox aside, telling him they needed to register with the "droid steward."<ref name="world" />

==Behind the scenes==
Branox made his first and only appearance in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity in ''[[Gambler's World]]'', a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] story arc written and illustrated by [[Russ Manning]] and released in [[1979]].<ref name="world" />
